title: Ivory Grosgrain Ribbon – 20 Metre Roll, 15mm Wide – Durable Ribbed Fabric Ribbon for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Sewing, Hair Bows, Decorations & DIY Projects
features: 🎀 HIGH-QUALITY Ivory Grosgrain Ribbon – Crafted from premium polyester with a distinct ribbed texture, this grosgrain ribbon is strong, flexible and perfect for a wide range of crafting and decorative uses.
📏 20 Metres Long, 15mm Wide – Each roll offers a generous 20 metre length and 15mm width (5/8 inch), ideal for everything from bows and trims to sewing projects and event décor.
🎁 GREAT FOR GIFT WRAPPING & PRESENTATION – Add a sophisticated touch to presents, gift boxes, party favours, and holiday packaging with this stylish Ivory ribbon.

🎀 IDEAL FOR HAIR BOWS & ACCESSORIES – Loved by crafters and small businesses, grosgrain ribbon is perfect for creating boutique-quality hair bows, headbands and clips thanks to its structure and durability.

🧵 VERSATILE FOR DIY & CRAFT PROJECTS – Whether you're making cards, scrapbooking, trimming garments, or decorating for weddings and baby showers, this Ivory grosgrain ribbon is a reliable and attractive choice.
description: Product Description Beautiful Grosgrain Ribbon - Durable Ribbed Texture Crafted with premium polyester, our grosgrain ribbon features a signature ribbed weave that resists fraying, holds shape, and adds structure to every project. Enjoy the creative freedom of Grosgrain ribbon with it being as functional as it is beautiful. Luxurious Grosgrain Ribbon Whether you're a small business owner, an event planner, or a weekend crafter, our ribbon is made to inspire creativity and deliver quality with every roll. Trusted by thousands for weddings, birthdays, and everyday crafts. Crafted for Creatives From card making and scrapbooking to sewing and home décor, this versatile ribbon fits every creative vision. Create structured, long-lasting accessories with ease and style. Durable Polyester Fabric Polyester is strong and resistant to stretching and shrinking, making it ideal for repeated use. Horizontal Ribbed Texture The ribbon has fine, raised lines running across its width, known as ribs. Bold & Versatile Ideal for a wide range of projects including hair bows, gift wrapping, and trims. Convenient Roll Packaged neatly for easy measuring, cutting, and storage. Perfect for event planning, small businesses, or production crafting. Classic & Elegant Enhances the look of gifts, crafts, and formal decorations. For Creators, Crafters & Celebrations – Choose a Ribbon That Reflects Your Vision
